positive: A stylized celestial map integrated with abstract fauna. The central composition features glowing geometric constellations (like stylized nebulae and comets) interlocking with the silhouette of a majestic, soaring mythical bird (e.g., phoenix or griffin, highly geometricized). Use a deep midnight blue and burnt orange color palette, accented by vibrant gold ink. The style should be a blend of Art Deco etching and modern psychedelic mandalas. Ensure strong, clear black and white outlines against the colored wash. High contrast, central symmetry, suitable for a graphic T-shirt print.
